title: Automate Team Members Assignment
excerpt:
Looking for help to solve the following issue: 
I have created Persons and grouped those persons in one team 
I created a task assigned to the whole team.

posts.author: rania.akef (Misr.Pharmacies)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking for help to solve the following issue:
I have created Persons and grouped those persons in one team
I created a task assigned to the whole team.
I need to create a new column with type “Person” to automatically assign the team member who performed the update on this task.
The objective is to know which team member finished this task and to prevent multiple members to work on the same task.

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rania.akef

You should be able to add a column called “Last Updated”. That will tell you the person and the time that the last action was performed.

Screenshot 2022-12-21 at 10.37.08 AM749×271 20.9 KB

I hope this helps!
